next_suggestion: 派生 SH-VIS-M-001 fix（route-fix，vision-adapter.ts binary string → FileReader.readAsDataURL），然后 SH-SIDE-L-001（SidePanelApp.tsx onDeleteText id-based）

audit_findings.finding: Binary string accumulation O(n²) in preprocessForVL/compressFallback. For compressed outputs 1.5MB-10MB, loop performs ~1M string concatenations. V8 may optimize but not guaranteed in service worker.
audit_findings.remediation: Replace with FileReader.readAsDataURL(blob) or chunked base64 conversion

audit_findings.finding: onDeleteText passes array index instead of VerifiedText.id, inconsistent with SH-M-005 id-based deletion in handleRegionsChange
audit_findings.remediation: Change onDeleteText to pass t.id and look up by id in handleDeleteText
